title: Monday.com to Powerbi through PowerBI DOIT connector
excerpt: Can you please let us know is the PowerBi Connector from Monday.com can give us the LIVE instant feed from Monday.com to PowerBI. As of now we are trying to use the connector but getting only the snapshot of Monday.com d…

posts.author: rsaro100 (Saravanan)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you please let us know is the PowerBi Connector from Monday.com can give us the LIVE instant feed from Monday.com to PowerBI. As of now we are trying to use the connector but getting only the snapshot of Monday.com data. If I modify anything in Monday.com then I have to again create a new connector to export the data through the connector to PowerBi.
